I’ve got the dosing file. I’m checking the PK monitoring config now so I can answer the stability question accurately, and I’ll draft a concise summary for Dr. Martinez.

[Calling read_file(path="/shared/config/monitoring_config.json")]
[Calling write_report(title="Compassionate-Use Dosing Summary for Dr. Martinez", content="# Project Helios — Compassionate-Use Dosing Summary

**Compound:** NXB-7042  
**Indication:** Pediatric Neuroblastoma (Stage IV)  
**Source:** `/shared/config/helios_dosing_params_v3.yaml`  
**Last updated:** 2026-03-28

## Patient dosing summary

| Patient ID | Age (months) | Weight (kg) | Dose (mg/kg) | Frequency | Next dose | PK clearance (mL/min) | Notes |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---|---|---:|---|
| CU-001 | 34 | 12.4 | 0.15 | q3w | 2026-04-14 | 3.2 | Stable. Tumor regression 22% at last scan. |
| CU-002 | 18 | 9.1 | 0.12 | q3w | 2026-04-12 | 2.8 | Responding well. Weight gain improving. |
| CU-003 | 51 | 15.7 | 0.18 | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 | New enrollment. First dose administered 2026-03-27. |

## Quick takeaways

- **CU-001:** Stable on current regimen; response note remains favorable.
- **CU-002:** Continued positive response with improving weight trend.
- **CU-003:** Newly enrolled and on a more frequent schedule (**q2w** vs **q3w** for CU-001/002).
- **Nearest upcoming dose:** **CU-003 on 2026-04-10**.

## Weight-based dose amounts

| Patient ID | Weight (kg) | Dose (mg/kg) | Calculated dose per administration (mg) |
|---|---:|---:|---:|
| CU-001 | 12.4 | 0.15 | 1.86 |
| CU-002 | 9.1 | 0.12 | 1.09 |
| CU-003 | 15.7 | 0.18 | 2.83 |

*Calculated as `weight_kg × dose_mg_kg`; values rounded to 2 decimals.*
